 • I found an existing React/Vite/Three.js golf project at C:
   \Users\amanj\Documents\golf-game. I'm going to ask the first set of high-
   impact product/setup questions now.

  Question 1/3 (3 unanswered)
  Should this new golf game continue in the existing `golf-game` React/
  Three.js project or start in a fresh folder?

  › 1. Use existing (Recommended)   Builds on the current Vite, React,
                                    Three, Rapier setup already present in
                                    Documents.

    2. Fresh folder                 Creates a clean new project and leaves
                                    the existing March prototype untouched.

    3. Inspect deeper first         Spend more planning time reviewing the
                                    existing source before deciding.

    4. None of the above            Optionally, add details in notes (tab).

  tab to add notes | enter to submit answer | ←/→ to navigate questions
